steps.title: Subtract 45 from both sides
steps.content:
Starting with $15x + 45 = 180$, subtract $45$ from both sides:
$$15x = 180 - 45 = 135$$

steps.title: Identify the equivalent equation
steps.content: The original equation is equivalent to $15x = 135$, which has the same solution ($x = 9$).

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• A. $15x = 45$ gives $x = 3$; different solution.
  • B. $15x = 90$ gives $x = 6$; different solution.
  • C. $15x = 135$ gives $x = 9$; matches the original.
  • D. $15x = 180$ gives $x = 12$; different solution.
That matches the correct answer - C is correct.
